title: unshare: move some code from cmd/buildah/unshare
body:
so that it can be reused by other programs.

alternative version for: https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/313

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body: Can you put this in buildah/pkg/unshare?

LGTM
I'm just starting to wondering long-term if this package should live under Buildah or somewhere under a more generic containers project?
We have been discussing that back and forth, For now lets just fix it in Buildah so skopeo can use it, and then moving forward we could decide to move it.

:pushpin: Commit 427d3a2 has been approved by `rhatdan`
